channel.title: Frontion - Geopolitical News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 💰📈 US consumer inflation vaults above 4% as Iran war drives energy prices
item.description: US consumer inflation rose at its fastest pace in three years in May, with energy costs surging amid the Middle East conflict, giving the Federal Reserve ammunition to keep interest rates unchanged into 2027.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦⛽ Russian-held Sevastopol suspends fuel distribution after Ukraine strikes
item.description: The governor of Russian-occupied Sevastopol in Crimea delayed fuel distribution plans after Ukrainian drone attacks disrupted supply routes, the latest in Kyivs campaign targeting Russian logistics.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇪🇺📊 EU fiscal watchdog criticises loosening budget rules for energy transition
item.description: The European Fiscal Board warned that allowing governments to spend defence fiscal flexibility on clean energy transition undermines EU fiscal discipline, amid debates over how to fund both priorities.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇮🇳📉 Indian shares set to open lower on Middle East escalation and US inflation
item.description: Indian equities are likely to open lower as fresh escalation between the US and Iran and a sharp jump in US inflation trigger risk-off sentiment across global markets.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ⛪🕊️ Pope Leo XIV blesses Gaudis Sagrada Familia on centenary of architects death
item.description: Pope Leo XIV celebrated Mass at Barcelonas iconic Sagrada Familia basilica exactly 100 years after architect Antoni Gaudis death, blessing the towering architectural masterpiece.
item.dc:creator: CNN

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ Iran targets US bases in Jordan and Gulf after Trump orders strikes near Hormuz
item.description: Iran launched missiles and drones at US bases in Jordan, Kuwait, and Bahrain in retaliation for American strikes on Iranian air defenses and surveillance sites near the Strait of Hormuz following the downing of a US Apache helicopter.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇬🇧🚔 Belfast stabbing sparks second night of violence and unrest
item.description: Northern Irelands capital experienced a second night of disorder after a stabbing incident, with approximately 200 people gathering in Newtownabbey and hurling objects at police as tensions simmered.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇺🇸⚖️ Trump-UFC costs lawsuit challenges federal agency spending
item.description: A lawsuit challenges the Trump administration over costs tied to federal agencies and UFC-related spending, raising questions about government expenditure practices.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇯🇵☢️ Japan nuclear safety faces scrutiny over radioactive waste management
item.description: Japans nuclear safety protocols are under review as concerns mount over radioactive waste handling and energy policy in the aftermath of continued debates over nuclear power expansion.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇮🇩💰 Danantara starts bond sale test after Indonesian market selloff
item.description: Indonesias sovereign wealth fund Danantara began selling bonds to test investor appetite following a market selloff, as the country navigates economic headwinds and seeks to attract foreign capital.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg

item.title: 🇨🇳🖥️ Chinese AI police tech targets physical, psychological and emotional states
item.description: Chinas police are deploying AI technology that monitors and analyzes human physical, psychological, and emotional states, raising concerns about surveillance capabilities and human rights implications.
item.dc:creator: South China Morning Post

item.title: 🇺🇸💵 House lawmakers back 2027 military pay raise proposal
item.description: House lawmakers expressed support for a military pay raise in 2027 as part of ongoing defense budget negotiations, amid broader debates over military compensation and recruitment challenges.
item.dc:creator: Federal News Network

item.title: 🇮🇳🌡️ Indias urban boom turns cities into heat traps
item.description: Rapid urbanization in India is creating dangerous heat island effects in cities, as concrete and asphalt absorb and radiate heat, worsening the impact of climate change on vulnerable populations.
item.dc:creator: Nikkei Asia

item.title: 🇺🇸💥 US military says carrying out self-defence strikes against Iran
item.description: The US military announced it was conducting self-defence strikes against Iranian targets in response to continued aggression, marking an escalation in the ongoing conflict between Washington and Tehran.
item.dc:creator: The Straits Times

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Trump administration faces scrutiny over federal actions
item.description: The Trump administration continues to face oversight questions as multiple federal agencies navigate policy implementation amid the Iran conflict and domestic priorities.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇮🇱🗳️ Netanyahu to run for re-election despite Trump doubts
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahus party confirmed he will seek re-election despite President Trump expressing doubts about his political future, as Israel navigates the regional conflict.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🌍📦 Iran war anxiety sends global container shipping rates soaring
item.description: The cost of shipping a container from Asia to the US has doubled since the start of the Iran war, driven by spiking fuel prices and increased demand from importers worried about further price hikes as the conflict continues.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦🚢 Ukraine strikes Mariupol port, significantly limiting its use
item.description: Ukrainian forces struck the Russian-occupied port of Mariupol, significantly limiting its use in the latest of a series of drone attacks on logistics across a critical stretch of Moscow-held southern Ukraine connecting Russia to Crimea.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇰🇵 Senior US human rights officials meet North Korea detainee families
item.description: Senior US human rights officials held meetings with families of Americans detained in North Korea, as Washington continues efforts to secure the release of citizens held by Pyongyang.
item.dc:creator: UPI

item.title: 🇱🇧⚖️ UN to send team to Lebanon over potential international law violations
item.description: The United Nations announced it will dispatch a team to Lebanon to investigate potential international law violations amid the ongoing regional conflict, focusing on civilian protection concerns.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇨🇳💬 Chinese propagandists stoking dissent over Trump tariffs and data centres
item.description: OpenAI reported that Chinese propagandists are actively stoking dissent in the US over Trump administration tariffs and data centre policies, using coordinated influence operations to exploit domestic divisions.
item.dc:creator: South China Morning Post

item.title: 🇨🇳🏭 Pentagons expanded blacklist of Chinese firms ahead of Xis US visit
item.description: The Pentagon expanded its blacklist of Chinese companies, raising questions about how this will impact President Xi Jinpings planned visit to the US amid ongoing tensions over trade and technology.
item.dc:creator: South China Morning Post

item.title: 🇮🇷💥 Explosions and airstrikes reported across southern Iran amid new US attacks
item.description: Explosions and airstrikes were reported across multiple locations in southern Iran as the US military launched fresh attacks, marking an escalation in the conflict that has drawn regional and international concern.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency
